dimensions.title: Production SHA matches main HEAD
dimensions.evidence: Last deploy.yml run (databaseId 28151774361, 2026-06-25T06:37:53Z) used headSha 70783c079efc3d81f5a1d2b8dffd339d64457984. main HEAD is 8cfebde536e3c4ab19e8e2402d0d508e4cffb0ee. SHA mismatch — production is behind main. G-CONST-13 recorded as OPEN in CURRENT_STATE.md.

dimensions.title: Ingestor ran successfully within 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: Last successful ingestor.cycle at 2026-06-24T14:49:45Z (status=succeeded). Most recent run at 2026-06-25T06:38:53Z had status=failed. Age since last success: ~17.3 hours at time of audit (2026-06-25T08:10:00Z). Threshold: 30 minutes.

dimensions.title: No stuck outbox rows older than 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM distribution_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' returned stuck_count=552. Threshold: 0. Note: table is distribution_outbox (not outbox) — confirmed via information_schema.

dimensions.title: Dead-letter queue below 500 rows
dimensions.evidence: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM distribution_outbox WHERE status = 'dead_letter' returned dl_count=946. Threshold: <500. Exceeds threshold by 446 rows. CURRENT_STATE.md notes 'outbox queue elevated' as current blocker.

dimensions.title: No CRITICAL DB tripwires active
dimensions.evidence: CURRENT_STATE.md (last verified 2026-06-25T13:00:00Z) records: G-CONST-12 OPEN (DB-health tripwire parity gap — missing provider_offer_history, game_results, TOAST bloat check); outbox queue elevated (pending 533, dead_letter 467, pending>30min 317 per prior ops:brief); deploy SHA gap. G-CONST-11 (retention execution preflight gate) also OPEN.

dimensions.title: CI verify green on main HEAD
dimensions.evidence: gh run list --branch main shows CI workflow in_progress on headSha 8cfebde536e3c4ab19e8e2402d0d508e4cffb0ee at audit time. Post-Merge QA Gate, Housekeeping Fast CI, Post-Merge Lane Close all concluded success on same SHA. No completed verify.yml workflow found (workflow may be named differently). Status recorded as unknown — CI was running at time of audit.

dimensions.title: T1 lane proofs contain merge SHA binding
dimensions.evidence: Sampled 4 recent T1 done lanes: UTV2-1285 (merge_sha eaf4b3ec), UTV2-1286 (merge_sha 2b50bf59), UTV2-1288 (merge_sha 99006b7b), UTV2-1301 (merge_sha 20e2372d). All proof files contain explicit Merge SHA references in verification.md and/or evidence.json. Note: lane manifest JSON files show merge_sha=NONE field but proof bundles contain the binding correctly.
